Metadata.title: Polymind — One prompt to every top AI
Metadata.description: Send one prompt to every top AI — GPT, Claude, Gemini — and compare answers side by side. Skip the copy-paste.

Landing.hero: One prompt. Every top AI. Pick the best.
Landing.heroSub: Skip the tab-juggling. Send one prompt to every top AI and pick the answer that fits.
Landing.feature1Body: Send one question to the latest GPT, Claude, and Gemini in parallel. No more switching between three AI chat tabs.
Landing.feature2Body: See where models agree, where they disagree, and where each one shines. The fastest way to compare top AI models side by side.
Landing.feature3Body: Every conversation is saved to your account. Revisit, refine, and reuse the AI answers that fit best — across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and any other model you've added.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: No subscription. Buy credits when you need them.
Landing.pricingFreeDesc: Sign up and start asking. No card required.
Landing.pricingProDesc: 1 credit = 1 question, answered by every model in parallel.
Landing.pricingNeverExpire: Credits never expire while your account is active.

Beta.noticeBody: Polymind is in open beta. Try every feature for free — your feedback shapes v1.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.a1: A multi-AI chat that sends one prompt to GPT, Claude, and Gemini at the same time. You see all three answers side by side and pick the one that fits — without juggling tabs or copy-pasting.
FAQ.q2: Why not just use ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini directly?
FAQ.a2: Because no single AI is best at everything. If you already check answers across multiple models for important tasks, Polymind removes the friction — same workflow, but in one chat instead of three tabs.
FAQ.a3: Yes, completely free during open beta. New accounts get 200 credits (1 credit ≈ 1 prompt to all three models). For more credits during beta, email {email}.
FAQ.a4: Yes — paid plans launch when beta ends. Pricing will be pay-as-you-go credit packs, not subscription. Beta users keep their feedback-shaping influence on the v1 launch.
FAQ.a5: Prompts and responses are stored in your account so you can revisit them. They're never used to train models — Polymind routes through Vercel AI Gateway, which has zero data retention by default. You can delete any conversation anytime.
FAQ.q6: Can I switch which AI models Polymind uses?
FAQ.a6: Yes — each of the three columns can be set to any chat-capable model on Vercel AI Gateway (100+ models). The default is the latest frontier GPT, Claude, and Gemini. Click any column header to swap.
